mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN TOTAL.STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(TOTAL.CO2_REDUCTION_G, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS co2, SUM(CASE WHEN TOTAL.STATUS = 'Y' THEN NVL(TOTAL.TREE_EFFECT, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS tree FROM ( SELECT H.STATUS, Q.CO2_REDUCTION_G, Q.TREE_EFFECT FROM INTEGRATED_HISTORY H JOIN QUIZ Q ON H.REF_ID = Q.QUIZ_NO WHERE H.ACTIVITY_TYPE LIKE 'QUIZ_%'
UNION ALL
SELECT H.STATUS, QS.CO2_REDUCTION_G, QS.TREE_EFFECT FROM INTEGRATED_HISTORY H JOIN QUEST QS ON H.REF_ID = QS.QUEST_NO WHERE H.ACTIVITY_TYPE = 'QUEST' ) TOTAL WHERE TOTAL.STATUS = 'Y'
